subcodes.first_line: I bear witness to that which God hath testified in the dominion of utterance and in the kingdom of the Pen: that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد بما شهد الله فی جبروت اللسان ثم فی ملکوت القلم بانه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @mind as intermediary between soul and body
